headline: Hubbell to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
summary: Shelton, CT, May 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) today announced that Gerben Bakker, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, will appear at the Wells Fargo Industrials Conference. The event will be webcast and is scheduled to begin at 9:30AM CDT on Tuesday, June 9, 2026. The live audio of the event will be available and can be accessed by visiting Hubbell's Investor Relations section. You can also access this information by going to www.hubbell.com and selecting "Inv
